_comment: @regenera/bank-core Cloud Armor Geo-Blocking Policy - BACEN/LGPD Compliance
name: regenera-geo-blocking
description: Block all traffic originating outside of permitted operational regions. Hardened for strict Brazilian operations.

rules.description: Deny traffic not originating from Brazil (primary) or US (partners/integrations)
Explicitly block known malicious ASNs/Tor exit nodes based on Threat Intel
